name: sysGetVariableLongLong
title: sysGetVariableLongLong
syntax: int64 sysGetVariableLongLong(char namespace[], char variable[]); // form 1
description: Returns the value of a variable of a 64 bit integer type.
The function can also be used for variables of type unsigned 64bit integer. You can simply cast the result to qword.
return: Value of the variable or 0 in case of error (form 1 and 2)
